body:
This PR adds a JET test for `apply` in the `linsolve!` kernel, a complement to the JET test for `compose` in the `Wfact!` kernel.

I've also added

```julia
ClimaCore.Operators.allow_mismatched_fd_spaces() = false
```

to the end of the `Wfact!` test and wrapped it in a `@testset`.

We could apply the same pattern from the `compose` source code to the `apply` code, but it looks like there may not be a performance improvement? I suppose we could compare timings if we think it's important.
title: Add JET test for apply in linsolve kernel

body: This PR bumps the patch version for a new release.
title: Bump patch version for new release
